title: Leaks related to `UIViewControllerCoordinator`
author: trunghvbk-afataw

title: I want to pop to the root view when a flow is finished in SwiftUI. How can I do this?
author: Rylaa
body: I have a flow that continues with push, and when the flow is finished, I want to return to the dashboard, but I couldn't figure out how to do it.

title: Could not resolve a root view controller.
author: trunghvbk-afataw

title: Not able to build - Type '_SwiftUIX_KeyPress' does not conform to protocol 'Equatable'
author: garethlloyd1994
body:
I am attempting to using the below to add via spm:
```swift
 .package(url: "https://github.com/SwiftUIX/Coordinator.git", branch:"master"),
```

I am seeing the error which is because the package is being pointed to master branch of SwiftUIX which is failing.

![Screenshot 2023-09-07 at 2 49 01 pm](https://github.com/SwiftUIX/Coordinator/assets/122424426/f1ed7341-f6c6-4a3c-a943-0c480c5a68eb)

title: Type '() -> _TargetPlatformConditionalModifiable<Root, _SwiftUI_TargetPlatform.macOS>' cannot conform to 'View'
author: quocleviet79

title: os_unfair_lock_lock is being called from AppDelegate
author: fampaySiddharth
body:
If I use debug google service plist for Firebase and initialize with it.
Then Merge throws a os_unfair_lock_lock error, sometimes reactor.dispatch also throws this

![Screenshot 2023-05-31 at 5 59 07 PM](https://github.com/SwiftUIX/Coordinator/assets/92845187/a1d0e4e6-f231-4d6f-a9f3-e1dc77fb7516)

title: Are you sure about the name? It seems like more Router pattern than Coordinator.
author: aakpro

title: Swallow Lib not being imported
author: fampaySiddharth

title: EnvironmentObjects not being passed to `.present`-ed views
author: nsillik

title: Do we have some transition type similar to fullScreenCover?
author: peetorres
body:
Hello! First of all, this is an amazing repo! Congratulations!!

I'm studying use it into some proof of concept project, and I didn't found nothing about present in full screen. 
Do you have implemented this scenario? There's something more to do when when we return `.present(view)` into Coordinator?

I've tried to use `.set(view)`, but it's replacing my current view, right? So with this we don't have the `@Environment(\.presentationMode) var presentationMode` to dismiss later 😩.

Thank you.

title: Use with TabBar
author: huyparody
body: How do I use this with TabBar?
